title: Reference smoke: persons load, build, reopen, lookup, 100k
description: Fast smoke/reference experiment for the normal persisted storage lifecycle at 100k records.

dataset.notes: Synthetic persons(id,name,age) dataset for controlled storage-engine measurement.

workload.notes: Reverse bulk load, build/stabilize, reopen/refresh, direct lookup, deterministic random point lookup sample.

fault.notes: No fault injection in this executable catalog experiment.

fairness.notes: Targets should use equivalent durable persisted semantics.
